human_verification.notes: Reviewed issue #1331 requirements, neobank servicing boundary discipline, bank-fintech source quality, scenario coverage, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for service-support-and-resolution plus cross-industry are represented and validated.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and this readiness evidence.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to neobank servicing, including sponsor-bank-backed account, card, ACH, P2P, complaint, disclosure, and escalation workflows without legal, fraud, AML, or approval drift.

Authority sources cover bank-fintech third-party governance, third-party deposit arrangements, Regulation E dispute handling, deposit-insurance communication, pass-through evidence, suspicious-activity evidence handling, and ACH fraud controls with refresh and decay metadata.

Scenario set covers missing industry evidence, unsupported override requests, repeat failure, adjacent-lane escalation, conflicting policies, and industry-specific refusal when neobank context is treated as cosmetic.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; sponsor-bank, processor, and jurisdictional differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
